## Review checklist

- [ ] The PR contains one phase or one bounded objective.
- [ ] Existing user-owned changes are excluded.
- [ ] Handoff and validation records are current.
- [ ] No type, lint, or test failure is hidden by configuration.
- [ ] Every actionable review comment is tracked in `docs/recovery/reviews/`.
